# Digilogue - Digital Marketing Company &amp; Agency

## Sitemaps

- [XML Sitemap](https://www.digilogues.com/sitemap.xml): Contains all public & indexable URLs for this website.

## Posts

- [Myntra Takes Fashionistas To Bangkok For IIFA!](#) - In a glittering event in Delhi last evening, Myntra, the official style partners for the IIFA Weekend 2018, in Bangkok on 23rd June, announced its exclusive red carpet line for the event. Myntra’s fashion show at the IIFA Rocks, Bangkok, during the IIFA weekend will set a benchmark in democratising fashion with live engagement for Myntra consumers in India, as they shop the looks off the ramp.
- [This Overlooked Sound Can Elevate Your Video Filming](https://www.digilogues.com/digital-dialogues/this-overlooked-sound-can-elevate-your-video-filming/) - Often overlooked in corporate videos, ambient noise is key to natural, engaging video filming. Learn how to use it in interviews, office walkthroughs & more.

- [Nothing Artificial For Me Please](#) - Artificial preservatives have been shown the door by McDonald’s India now. This hasn’t happened overnight though. A series of steps have been taken by McDonald’s India in the last 6-7 years to ensure that food served at the outlets match the expectations of the new age customers.
- [McCafé Scores A Century](http://mcdonaldsblog.in/2017/02/mccafe-scores-a-century-2/#new_tab) - The number hundred is a huge milestone as well as a special number for rating things. When a song figures high on Billboard Hot Top 100, or a player scores a ton in a cricket match, these are regarded as sureshot signs of success. McDonald’s India (West & South) too touched a special 100th milestone

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.digilogues.com/) - Digilogue is a digital brand communications agency offering services in content, design, software, video editing, social media, mobile and web applications etc.
- [The Team](https://www.digilogues.com/the-team/) - Meet the talented team behind Digilogues. Our digital marketing professionals are dedicated to delivering innovative solutions and exceptional results.
- [About Us](https://www.digilogues.com/about-us/) - Learn about Digilogues, your trusted digital marketing partner. Discover our mission, values, and commitment to driving your business's online success.
- [Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)](https://www.digilogues.com/faqs/) - What are the main services offered by Digilogues? Digilogue Communications operates as a comprehensive digital communications agency, dedicated to fostering connections between companies, brands, and their audiences through compelling narratives.Digilogue Communications houses professionals with skills in Design, Content, and Software to create, develop, publish, distribute and populate online content that creates the bridge between companies
- [Contact Us](https://www.digilogues.com/contact-us/) - Contact Digilogues for all your digital marketing inquiries. Our team is ready to help you achieve your online goals. Get in touch for a consultation!
- [Portfolio](https://www.digilogues.com/portfolios/) - Explore our digital marketing portfolio, which showcases successful campaigns and client results. See how Digilogues drives growth through innovative strategies.
